description: Discussion on cross-chain identity solutions and decentralized data management featuring Chris Hart from Civic, Gabe Cohen from Three Box Labs, and Simon Harmgart from Parsec and IQ Labs.
topic_summary: Panelists discuss the importance of identity in blockchain, the role of decentralized storage, and innovations in real-time data access across multiple chains [t=12:48-20:16]. Chris Hart highlights Civic's identity solutions for various use cases including NFTs and DeFi [t=55:39-81:92]. Gabe Cohen explains the Ceramic Network's approach to mutable data and decentralized identity [t=177:13-206:18]. Simon Harmgart introduces Parsiq's streaming data capabilities and the IQ Protocol for tokenomics [t=225:16-341:64].
